---
title: "R：多元线性回归"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: false
    code-copy: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

使用 R 的 `lm` 对与 Python Notebook 完全相同的样本拟合模型

$$
\text{Employed}=\beta_0+\beta_1\text{GNP}+\beta_2\text{Unemployed}
+\beta_3\text{Armed.Forces}+\varepsilon.
$$

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)

data <- as_tibble(datasets::longley)
head(data, 8)
```

## 模型拟合

```{r}
model <- lm(
  Employed ~ GNP + Unemployed + Armed.Forces,
  data = data
)

tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE)
glance(model)
summary(model)
```

## 诊断图

```{r}
diagnostics <- tibble(
  fitted = fitted(model),
  observed = data$Employed,
  residual = residuals(model)
)

ggplot(diagnostics, aes(fitted, observed)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "#397d78", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(colour = "#52649a", alpha = 0.78, size = 2.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Observed versus fitted",
    x = "Fitted Employed",
    y = "Observed Employed"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

```{r}
ggplot(diagnostics, aes(fitted, residual)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "#397d78", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(colour = "#52649a", alpha = 0.78, size = 2.2) +
  labs(
    title = "Residual diagnostics",
    x = "Fitted Employed",
    y = "Residual"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```

## 结果解释

两种语言使用相同的 `longley` 数据集、设计矩阵和最小二乘准则，因此估计结果
仅存在浮点舍入级别的差异。
